MULTIPLAYERRELICS-ODDLY_RESONATING_STONE: At the start of each combat, resonate with fellow stone holders to defend against the erosion of this world.
At the start of combat, gain Dexterity equal to number of relic holders.
MULTIPLAYERRELICS-WELCOME_MAT.title: Welcome Mat
MULTIPLAYERRELICS-WELCOME_MAT.descriptio: The first card you play each combat is played for all allies.
MULTIPLAYERRELICS-PERISCOPE.title: Periscope
MULTIPLAYERRELICS-PERISCOPE.description: Upon pickup, obtain an additional copy of a card in another players [gold]Deck[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERRELICS-BONDS.title: Bonds
MULTIPLAYERRELICS-BONDS.description: At the start of each combat, shuffle a random multiplayer card into each player's [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
